message:
Extract reusable diagnostic hook/log substrate into ftui-widgets::diagnostics (#33)

Both `mouse_playground` and `inspector` independently implemented
identical diagnostic infrastructure: DiagnosticLog, TelemetryCallback,
FNV-1a checksums, JSONL serialization, stderr mirroring, and bounded
eviction. This extracts the shared patterns into a new generic module.

New shared types in `ftui_widgets::diagnostics`:
- `DiagnosticRecord` trait — JSONL serialization contract
- `DiagnosticLog<E>` — generic bounded in-memory log with stderr mirror
- `TelemetryCallback<E>` — generic observer callback type alias
- `fnv1a_hash()` — shared FNV-1a checksum utility
- `env_flag_enabled()` — boolean environment variable helper

Both modules now use type aliases (`type DiagnosticLog =
diagnostics::DiagnosticLog<DiagnosticEntry>`) and implement
`DiagnosticRecord` for their domain-specific entry types, preserving
full API compatibility while eliminating ~200 lines of duplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
